Kylian Mbappé

    About Kylian Mbappé

    Kylian Mbappé is a 27-year-old professional footballer from France who plays as a Forward for Real Madrid CF in the Spanish La Liga. His main position is Striker (ST), and he also gets assigned to play as Left Wing (LW) or Left Midfielder (LM). He is right-footed, stands 182cm (6'0") tall, and weighs 75kg (165lbs).

    Kylian Mbappé's FC 26 Rating

    Kylian Mbappé is rated 91 overall in FC 26, with Quick Step+ Ability, 5-Star Skill Moves, and 4-Star Weak Foot. His standout attributes are Pace (96 PAC), Dribbling (92 DRI), and Shooting (91 SHO).

    Kylian Mbappé FC 26 Abilities

    Quick Step+
    Physical

    Significantly faster acceleration during Explosive Sprint.

    Acrobatic
    Scoring

    Perform volleys with increased accuracy, acrobatic volley animations.

    Finesse Shot
    Scoring

    Faster finesse shots with more curve and accuracy.

    First Touch
    Ball Control

    Reduced trapping error, faster dribbling transition.

    Gamechanger
    Finishing

    Fancy and Trivela shots are performed with improved accuracy.

    Low Driven Shot
    Scoring

    Enhances a player's ability to execute low driven shots with increased accuracy, faster ball travel, and quicker shot execution.

    Rapid
    Ball Control

    Higher sprint speed while dribbling, reduced error on knock-ons.
